sensitivity: 95.1% (for mtmDR with dilate-if-needed images); 96.8% (for vtDR with Topcon NW400)
specificity: 86.1% (for mtmDR with dilate-if-needed images); 92.4% (for vtDR with dilate-if-needed images)
intended_use: EyeArt is indicated for use by healthcare providers to automatically detect more than mild diabetic retinopathy and vision-threatening diabetic retinopathy (severe non-proliferative diabetic retinopat
intended_use_full: EyeArt is indicated for use by healthcare providers to automatically detect more than mild diabetic retinopathy and vision-threatening diabetic retinopathy (severe non-proliferative diabetic retinopathy or proliferative diabetic retinopathy and/or diabetic macular edema) in eyes of adults diagnosed with diabetes who have not been previously diagnosed with diabetic retinopathy. EyeArt is indicated for use with Canon CR-2 AF, Canon CR-2 Plus AF, and Topcon NW400 cameras.
target_condition: Diabetic retinopathy (more than mild and vision-threatening forms)
ground_truth: Dilated 4-wide field stereo fundus imaging graded by certified graders at the University of Wisconsin Reading Center per the Early Treatment for Diabetic Retinopathy Study (ETDRS) severity scale
other_metrics: Imageability (undilated first submission): 88.4% for mtmDR, 88.6% for vtDR; Imageability (dilate-if-needed final submission): 99.1% for both mtmDR and vtDR. Intra-operator repeatability and inter-operator reproducibility reported for precision (APA and ANA ranging from 97.2% to 100.0%)
